methodology.headline: Available default-scope APIs divided by all default-scope NumPy APIs.
methodology.default_scope: Top-level NumPy callables; ndarray public methods and properties; callable exports of numpy.random, numpy.linalg, and numpy.fft.
methodology.availability_note: Compiled API availability is distinct from fully verified behavioral parity.
